name: Download Landing Pad
short_description: A menu-bar staging pad for fresh downloads with safe rename, reveal, and route actions.
audience: Mac users exporting screenshots, PDFs, and spreadsheets from the browser
Operators who constantly move files into chat, notes, or project folders
People who want Downloads cleanup to be deliberate instead of manual Finder churn
detail_lines: Starts with a deterministic doctor so Downloads path, source metadata, reveal support, and copy-path support are explicit before you act.
Surfaces the newest files in Downloads as one calm queue with age, size, and source hints once the local path is ready.
Keeps rename, reveal, copy-path, and explicit move actions in the same stop where the file first lands so browser exports leave Downloads on purpose.
